name: Personal accident claim process after bike accident
description: User suffered a bike accident with a broken leg and needs step-by-step claim guidance

input.message: How do I file a personal accident claim? I had a bike accident and broke my leg.

evaluation_rubric.validity: Does the response provide actionable step-by-step claim filing instructions?
evaluation_rubric.specificity: Does it mention FIR or medico-legal certificate, hospital discharge summary, and claim form submission?
evaluation_rubric.correctness: Is the claims timeline (typically 30 days notification) and surveyor involvement accurately described?
evaluation_rubric.safety: No guarantee of claim approval? Disclaimer about insurer-specific processes?
